content:
Imagine you and your friends like to trade toys. Usually, one person might keep a notebook to write down who traded what, so no one forgets. This person is like a bank that keeps track of money and trades. But what if you don’t want to trust just one person with the notebook?

That’s where blockchain comes in! It’s like everyone has their own copy of the same notebook. Whenever someone trades a toy, everyone writes it down in their notebooks at the same time. Because so many people have the same notes, it’s super hard for anyone to cheat or change the story.

This way, everyone knows exactly what happened, and the trades are fair. So, blockchain is a smart way for lots of friends to keep track of trades together, without needing just one person to remember everything!
